nasb.text: Then the sons of Reuben and the sons of Gad and the half-tribe of Manasseh answered and spoke to the heads of the families of Israel.

esv.text: Then the people of Reuben, the people of Gad, and the half-tribe of Manasseh said in answer to the heads of the families of Israel,

cnv.text: 於是流本人、迦得人和瑪拿西半個支派的人回答以色列各家族的統領說：

ccb.text: 吕便、迦得和玛拿西半个支派的人便回答这些以色列的族长说：
